nasb.text: There was a man in the land of Uz whose name was Job; and that man was blameless, upright, fearing God and turning away from evil.

esv.text: There was a man in the land of Uz whose name was Job, and that man was blameless and upright, one who feared God and turned away from evil.

cnv.text: 烏斯地有一個人，名叫約伯。這人完全、正直，敬畏　神，遠離罪惡。

ccb.text: 乌斯有一个人名叫约伯，他纯全正直，敬畏上帝，远离罪恶。
